status_description_rinne_cooldown: This eye technique is recovering and cannot be used yet.
status_description_chakra_exhaustion: Chakra fatigue reduces movement, damage, and attack speed.
status_description_genjutsu_1: An illusion that slows and weakens the target.
status_description_genjutsu_2: A stronger illusion that heavily slows movement and defense.
status_description_genjutsu_3: This genjutsu can leave the target unable to move.
status_description_shadow_clone: A temporary clone that vanishes when struck or when its duration ends.
status_description_sharingan_2t: The second tomoe has awakened and perception has increased.
status_description_sharingan_3t: The third tomoe has fully matured the Sharingan's predictive power.
status_description_status_amaterasu: Black flames that continuously burn and cripple the victim.
status_description_susanoo_ribcage: A partial Susanoo shell that greatly increases protection.
status_description_susanoo_ribcage_madar: A distinct Susanoo shell used by Madara.
status_description_tengai_shinsei: A celestial strike is being unleashed.
status_description_madara_ps: A colossal Susanoo manifestation that grants overwhelming offense and defense.
status_description_water_prison: Sphere of water traps and suffocates the target.
status_description_will_of_power: A temporary surge of resolve that boosts combat performance.
status_description_baryon_life_decay: Life force is consumed rapidly while this mode is active.
status_description_kurama_sage: A fusion of Kurama chakra and sage power, granting massive boosts.
status_description_chakra_armor_break: Armor has been negated due to improper flow of chakra!
status_description_kcm_aura: A cloak of the Nine-Tails chakra surrounds the user.
status_description_v1_aura: A chakra shroud emitted by a tailed-beast host.
status_description_kaiten: Rapid rotation creates a defensive dome that shreds nearby enemies.
status_description_64_palms: A barrage of strikes that shuts down movement and attack flow.
status_description_mokuton_tree: Wood release restrains the target, preventing effective action.
status_description_base_susanoo: A manifested skeletal warrior that boosts offense and defense.
status_description_rinnegan_controlled: This summon is bound to a Rinnegan wielder and obeys their path technique.
status_description_madara_tamed: This tailed beast is under Madara's genjutsu and temporarily obeys another kingdom.
status_description_ability_cooldown: This technique is on cooldown and cannot be cast yet.
status_description_inner_gate_1: The first gate opens, boosting movement and striking flow.
status_description_inner_gate_2: The second gate surges chakra through the body and restores vitality.
status_description_inner_gate_3: The third gate amplifies physical output at a growing bodily cost.
status_description_inner_gate_4: Power spikes violently while the body starts to tear itself apart.
status_description_inner_gate_5: The fifth gate shatters normal limits and strains muscles and bones.
status_description_inner_gate_6: The sixth gate grants explosive force but inflicts severe internal stress.
status_description_inner_gate_7: The seventh gate unleashes monstrous speed and overwhelming pressure.
status_description_inner_gate_8: The final gate burns through life itself for catastrophic power.
status_description_eight_gate_strain: Post-gate trauma leaves the body slowed, weakened, and fragile.
status_description_koh: The King of Hell emerges to judge and restore life.
status_description_adamantite_chains: Sealing chains that restrain and suppress the target.
status_description_eightAttack: A taijutsu attack stance empowering close-range strikes.
status_description_perfect_susanoo: A single stroke of its blade contains enough power to destroy all creation!
status_description_akimichi_grown: Expanded size grants power and durability at the cost of speed.
status_description_akimichi_shrunk: Compressed size increases speed but lowers survivability and strength.
status_description_six_paths_senjutsu: Grants Truth Seeking Orbs And A Few Techniques.
status_description_tso_shield: A brief orb barrier that massively increases armor when triggered.
status_description_infinite_tsukuyomi: Bound by the Infinite Tsukuyomi and unable to move.
status_description_juubi1: The immense power of the Ten Tails surges through you!
status_description_juubi2: You have mastered the power of the Ten Tails! Unleash its full potential!
status_description_TSBalls: Floating orbs of chakra that can nullify ninjutsu and reshape the battlefield!
status_description_perfect_frog_sage: Mastered frog sage state with strong offense and control.
status_description_perfect_slug_sage: Mastered slug sage state with superior defense and vitality.
status_description_perfect_snake_sage: Mastered snake sage state with high mobility and lethal strikes.
status_description_strength_hundred: Stored chakra is unleashed to massively reinforce the body.
status_description_creation_rebirth_cool: Creation Rebirth is recovering and cannot be reused yet.
status_description_jinchuriki_incomplete: To advance unit must be level 7+ with intelligence 20+ or diplomacy 20+.
status_description_jinchuriki_kcm1: To advance, unit must be level 9+, units can now obtain baryon mode.
status_description_jinchuriki_kcm2: To advance unit must be level 11+. Unit can also combine senjutsu energy at this stage.
status_description_jinchuriki_avatar: To obtain baryon mode, one must devote there life.
status_description_jinchuriki_baryon_mod: Ultimate power output with severe life-force consumption.
status_description_rasengan: A spiraling chakra sphere is primed for the next impact.
status_description_chidori: Lightning chakra is concentrated for a piercing strike.
status_description_weight_rock: Greatly increases damage at the sacrifice of speed.
status_description_jutsuuse: A brief casting state that marks the technique as being used.
trait_will_of_fire_info: The Spirit of the Leaf! A burning desire to protect the village
trait_will_of_fire_info_2: Aid allies when unit is on the brink of death. Buffs are granted to the village.
trait_curse_of_hatred_info: A dark conviction born from grief, rivalry, and loss.
trait_curse_of_hatred_info_2: When near death, this trait can spread a curse to nearby enemies.
trait_high_chakra_reserve_info_2: Rare birth or inheritance trait. Grants extra chakra capacity from the start.
trait_greater_chakra_reserve_info: A rare reserve that significantly boosts chakra capacity.
trait_greater_chakra_reserve_info_2: Very rare birth/inheritance trait with a larger chakra reserve than High Chakra Reserve.
trait_vast_chakra_reserve_info: An exceptional reserve found only in anomalies.
trait_vast_chakra_reserve_info_2: Extremely rare birth/inheritance trait. Strongest natural reserve tier.
trait_low_chakra_reserve_info: Civilian Reserves... barely enough to perform a jutsu.
trait_low_chakra_reserve_info_2: Can appear on birth. Lower reserve tier that struggles in prolonged chakra battles.
trait_rinnegan_info: The Eyes of a god! The Samsara Eye has finally appeared!
trait_rinnegan_info_2: Awakens when unit has traits Indra/Asura/Hagoromo paths). Grants Deva, Naraka, summon, and meteor techniques.
trait_rinnesharingan_info: Obtained by combining Ten-Tails Jinchuriki trait with the Rinnegan.
trait_rinnesharingan_info_2: Unlocks Infinite Tsukuyomi and Heavenly Ice Chamber. Infinite Tsukuyomi can be used if the unit has both yin release and 400 Chakra.
trait_sasuke_rinnegan_info: A legendary dojutsu, gifted by the Sage Of Six Paths.
trait_sasuke_rinnegan_info_2: Uses all the moves from the rinnegan and the Eternal Mangekyo. Amenotejikara is also available as a short-range teleportation jutsu.
trait_sharingan_info_2: Tomoe evolve in combat while the user has a target. Progression follows 1 to 3 tomoe requirements.
trait_sharingan_1t_info: First Awakening. I can see your movements clearly now!
trait_sharingan_1t_info_2: Slight Chance to daze enemies. Kill 4 enemies to evolve to the next stage.
trait_sharingan_2t_info: Perception Evolved! Your Genjutsu is getting stronger!
trait_sharingan_2t_info_2: Casts illusions on your enemies. Kill 7 enemies to evolve to stage 3!
trait_sharingan_3t_info: Fully Matured Eye! I can see the future of your attacks!
trait_sharingan_3t_info_2: Paralyze enemies with fear. You can only awaken the Mangekyo through tragedy
trait_mangekyo_sharingan_info: Unlocks the ability to use the black flames and defend yourself with a susanoo!
trait_mangekyo_sharingan_info_2: Unit must have the 2 or 3 tomoe sharingan and have experienced death of lover/family/best friend
trait_madara_eternal_mangekyo_info: A unique eternal eye once wielded by Madara Uchiha.
trait_madara_eternal_mangekyo_info_2: Currently grants the same stat power as Mangekyo Sharingan without active jutsu moves.
trait_nine_tails_jinchuriki_info: The Vessel! A Tailed Beast is sealed inside this unit.
trait_nine_tails_jinchuriki_info_2: Obtained by slaying the Nine Tails. First mode is giving when unit is level 2 and below 80% hp.
trait_hagoromo_chakra_info: Six Paths chakra from the Sage of Six Paths.
trait_hagoromo_chakra_info_2: Children of these units may inherit either Indra's Chakra or Asura's Chakra.
trait_otsutsuki_clan_info: A celestial bloodline from the highest level of chakra lineage.
trait_otsutsuki_clan_info_2: Units in this clan have access to a special kind of chakra...
trait_ten_tails_jinchuriki_info: The Ultimate Vessel! Contains the power of all tailed beasts combined!
trait_ten_tails_jinchuriki_info_2: God-like power that can combine with senjutsu for Six Paths Senjutsu. (no natural way to obtain right now)
trait_taijutsu_master_info: Who needs Ninjutsu when you have fists?!
trait_taijutsu_master_info_2: Units can counter attacks with a strong punch technique.
trait_eight_inner_gates_info: A forbidden taijutsu art that forcefully opens the body's limiters.
trait_eight_inner_gates_info_2: Can open up to 8 gates while under pressure. Massive power with escalating backlash and a chakra-break cooldown.
trait_cursed_mark_info: A cursed seal that floods the body with unstable power.
trait_cursed_mark_info_2: 20% chance to be obtained in a fight against Orochimaru Or .
status_description_cursed_mark1: The first cursed seal stage. Power rises, but the body starts to strain.
status_description_cursed_mark2: A stronger cursed seal stage with more power and heavier strain.
status_description_cursed_mark3: The most unstable cursed seal stage. Great power, severe cost.
trait_kaguya_clan_info: A bone-wielding bloodline known for brutal physical combat.
trait_kaguya_clan_info_2: At age 15 and above, each progression check has a 0.05% chance to awaken Shikotsumyaku.
trait_shikotsumyaku_info: The Kaguya bone technique that weaponizes the body's skeleton.
trait_shikotsumyaku_info_2: A Kaguya bloodline power with lethal close-range pressure.
status_description_shikodef: 35% chance to raise a 6 second bone guard that can reflect damage back at attackers.
trait_drunken_fist_info: A wild taijutsu style that turns unpredictability into offense.
trait_drunken_fist_info_2: A Shinobi Techniques trait reserved for chaotic close-range fighters.
trait_jugo_transformation_info: A cursed transformation fueled by unstable natural energy.
trait_jugo_transformation_info_2: A transformation trait for berserk, mutating chakra users.
trait_uchiha_clan_info: The Cursed Clan. Lineage of the legendary Sharingan!
trait_uchiha_clan_info_2: Survive fierce battles to awaken your eyes. Experience grief or kill enemies to evolve.
trait_akimichi_clan_info: A friendly clan known for their size manipulation techniques.
trait_akimichi_clan_info_2: Members can change their body mass and gain strength at the cost of speed.
trait_lee_clan_info: A taijutsu-focused bloodline that values hard work over flashy ninjutsu.
trait_lee_clan_info_2: Members have a small chance to awaken the Eight Inner Gates at the age of 24, and can become taijutsu masters at level 4.
trait_hyuga_clan_info_2: Allows unit to wield the Byakugan.
trait_uzumaki_clan_info_2: Possess massive chakra reserves, sealing prowess, and longevity.
trait_senju_clan_info_2: Masters of shinobi arts with immense physical vitality.
trait_byakugan_info_2: Most commonly gained through Hyuga lineage progression.
status_description_byakugan: One of the three great dojutsu. Level 3+ or more than 3 kills will purify the eye.
status_description_byakuganP: A stronger White Eye state that appears at level 3+ or after 3 kills.
status_description_byakuganG: High Level Otsutsuki can manifest this eye. Lvl 5+.
trait_eternal_mangekyo_info: The final stage of the Sharingan that never loses its light.
trait_eternal_mangekyo_info_2: Awakened by killing another unit with the Mangekyo. Unlocks the Perfect Susanoo.
trait_trait_blind_info_2: The heavy price paid for overusing the Mangekyo Sharingan.
trait_indra_chakra_info: The reincarnated chakra of Indra Otsutsuki.
trait_indra_chakra_info_2: Increases intelligence and combat skill, but isolates the user.
trait_asura_chakra_info: The reincarnated chakra of Asura Otsutsuki.
trait_asura_chakra_info_2: Massive boost to health, stamina, and bonds with others.
trait_hashi_cells_info: Implanted with the First Hokage's cells.
trait_hashi_cells_info_2: Grants massive regeneration, cures physical ailments, and grants wood release abilities...
trait_wood_release_info_2: A rare nature transformation that brings forests to life to crush enemies.
trait_fireN_info_2: At 125 Nature Exp, Unit will unlock Fire Ball Jutsu.
trait_earthN_info_2: At 125 Nature Exp, Unit will unlock Added Weight Rock Technique.
trait_waterN_info_2: At 125 Nature Exp, Unit will unlock Water Prison Technique
trait_windN_info_2: At 125 Nature Exp, Unit will unlock Wind Cutter Technique. At 250 Nature Exp, Unit has a chance to learn Rasenshuriken.
trait_lightningN_info_2: Electrifies jutsu and enhances speed and piercing damage. At 250 Nature Exp, users have a chance to learn Chidori.
trait_yin_release_info: Spiritual chakra affinity for creation and illusions.
trait_yang_release_info: Physical chakra affinity for vitality and force.
trait_yinyang_release_info: Balanced chakra of both Yin and Yang.
trait_trait_akatsuki_info: A member of the rogue shinobi organization.
trait_trait_akatsuki_info_2: Units with the evil trait have a 1% chance of randomly getting this trait above the age of 28.
trait_rank_academy_student_info_2: The starting point for all shinobi. Acquire level 2 to advance to Genin rank.
trait_rank_genin_info_2: Has graduated the academy and goes on basic missions. Acquire level 3 to advance to Chunin rank.
trait_rank_chunin_info_2: Qualified to lead teams and take on harder missions. Acquire level 5 to advance to Jonin rank.
trait_rank_jonin_info_2: Highly skilled shinobi with vast combat experience. Acquire level 7 to advance to Anbu rank.
trait_rank_anbu_info_2: Acquire level 9 to advance to Kage rank.
trait_rank_kage_info_2: The king of the village automatically gets this trait.
trait_rank_sannin_info_2: Granted to level 7 shinobi with any Senjutsu trait.
trait_rank_ghost_of_uchiha_info: A title for the strongest Uchiha wielders of eternal eyes.
trait_rank_ghost_of_uchiha_info_2: Requires Uchiha clan, eternal eyes (Eternal Mangekyo or Madara Eternal Mangekyo), and level 7+.
trait_rank_god_of_shinobi_info: A title reserved for complete mastery of shinobi arts.
trait_rank_god_of_shinobi_info_2: Unit must have been a kage at some point, level 7+, and all five natures.
trait_rasenganJ_info_2: Units with no chakra nature traits get a one-time chance to learn this at 500 Nature Exp.
trait_chidoriJ_info: Lightning-charged thrust that calls down a strike on impact.
trait_chidoriJ_info_2: Lightning users have a chance to learn this at 250+ Nature Exp.
trait_rasenshurikenJ_info: Small Chance to be given to wind release users at 250+ Nature Exp.
trait_shadow_clonej_info_2: Spawns shadow clones according to level
trait_stormR_info: Mastery over lightning. Bring thunderous damage to the land.
worldlog_kurama_killed: $name$ has killed the nine tailed beast
worldlog_rinnegan_meteor: AHHHHH..! $name$ summoned a massive meteor from the sky!
worldlog_infinite_tsukuyomi: $name$ has cast Infinite Tsukuyomi upon the world!
worldlog_juubi_sealed: The Ten-Tails has been sealed inside $name$
worldlog_god_of_shinobi: $name$ has become the god Of Shinobi!
worldlog_ghost_of_uchiha: $name$ has become the Ghost of Uchiha!
Mangekyo Sharingan usage level. At 25, p: Mangekyo Sharingan usage level. At 25, permanent blindness occurs.
Global chakra nature EXP. Every 100 EXP,: Global chakra nature EXP. Every 100 EXP, there is a 10% chance to gain a random missing base nature.
weapon_triple_scythe_description: A ritual scythe that draws blood.
weapon_kusanagi_description: Sasuke's iconic blade with deadly precision.
weapon_basic_kunai_description: A standard shinobi kunai for ranged attacks.
weapon_gunbai_description: A legendary war fan used to crush and repel foes.
weapon_bomb_kunai_description: A tagged kunai that explodes on impact.
weapon_executioner_blade_description: Kubikiribocho, the massive blade that thirsts for blood.
weapon_hagoromo_staff_description: A divine staff wielded by the Sage of Six Paths.
weapon_yin_staff_description: Truth-seeking staff attuned to Yin release.
weapon_yang_staff_description: Truth-seeking staff attuned to Yang release.
weapon_ftg_kunai_description: Minato's marked kunai that allows instant teleportation on impact.
armor_shinobi_flak_jacket_description: Standard issue flak armor worn by elite shinobi.
armor_warring_states_description: Ancient red armor worn by legends of the Warring States era.
armor_madara_sixpaths_cloak_description: A chakra mantle infused with Six Paths power and worn by the Ghost of the Uchiha.
trait_frog_sage_mode_info: A sage trait that grows from imperfect to perfect through progression.
trait_frog_sage_mode_info_2: Can be learned from level 5+ when in the Swamp or Jungle biomes.
trait_slug_sage_mode_info: A healing-focused sage trait that advances through status thresholds.
trait_slug_sage_mode_info_2: Can be learned from level 4+ when in the Enchanted or Lemon biomes.
trait_snake_sage_mode_info: A speed-and-pressure sage trait progressing from imperfect to perfect.
trait_snake_sage_mode_info_2: Can be learned from level 4+ when in the Rocklands or Desert biomes. Currently No moveset.
trait_wood_sage_mode_info: Hashirama-style Sage mode rooted in Wood Release.
trait_wood_sage_mode_info_2: Requires Wood Release, Hashirama Cells, and 600 Nature EXP.
trait_six_paths_sage_mode_info: A transcendent sage state tied to Six Paths power.
trait_six_paths_sage_mode_info_2: To obtain, unit must have Six Paths Senjutsu Status and Perfect Frog Sage Mode Status.
status_description_imperfect_frog_sage: Unit must be level 6 and have a max chakra of 400 to advance.
status_description_imperfect_slug_sage: Unit must be level 6 and have a max chakra of 400 to advance.
status_description_imperfect_snake_sage: Unit must be level 6 and have a max chakra of 400 to advance.
